creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Attached is an updated change requested with changes from the previous patch
incorporated.

Additionally, this updates to optionsNG framework, and drops use of
pre/post, as only options are required.

Thanks for your consideration!
-jgh

-- 
Jason Helfman
FreeBSD Committer | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh | The Power To Serve
